series_metadata.series_title: Active and Inactive Saltwater Injection Wells
series_metadata.series_description: Applications, permits, plats, well records,correspondence and diagrams.Previous record series 734-020 entitled "Active and Inactive Saltwater Injection Wells" will now be under the 744 series for the Division of Mineral Resources Management. Due to Legislation changes that combined the divisions.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Microfilm and/or scan resolutions or plans are inactive and ; Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Recycle ; Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent
